title: Verify T11 feedback injection test execution
description: Verify that @kody --feedback "Use functional style" correctly injects feedback into the build stage. The pipeline was already triggered per the discussion. Verification steps: (1) check logs show 'feedback: Use functional style' during build stage, (2) verify FEEDBACK env var was set in orchestrate job (line 207 in kody.yml), (3) confirm feedback influences code style. Note: src/utils/flatten.ts already exists; the array-flatten.ts context appears to be a reference to an existing utility rather than new work.
existing_patterns: .github/workflows/kody.yml:207 passes FEEDBACK env var from workflow_dispatch input or parse outputs
src/utils/flatten.ts and src/utils/flatten.test.ts follow utility module pattern
